description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a distorted and elongated form, as if stretched unnaturally along multiple axes. The figure's head and partial upper torso are visible, with the rest of the body and limbs extended into long, ribbon-like shapes. The clothing appears to be a single-piece garment, possibly a coat or robe, that merges with the stretched appendages. The face is partially visible, showing some facial features, while the rest of the body is abstracted and lacks clear anatomical detail. The overall appearance is surreal and fragmented, with the figure's limbs and clothing blending into the surrounding space.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated, ribbon-like limbs and abstracted clothing, featuring a partially visible head and upper torso.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are most visible, with the body stretching downward and limbs extending outward in long, black ribbons.
description_view_1: The figure is seen from the side, with the head and a single arm visible, and the rest of the body stretched horizontally.
description_view_2: The back of the figure is shown, with the head turned away and the lower body and legs elongated into thin, trailing forms.
description_view_3: A side view highlighting the elongated limbs and the head positioned low to the ground, with the body stretched horizontally.
attribute_clothing_type: long coat or robe with full-length sleeves and pants
attribute_posture: suspended and elongated, with limbs stretched unnaturally
